title: A Very Bad Modpack
description: Lightweight kitchen-sink modpack, focused on Create
body:
# A Very Bad Modpack

This modpack is designed to be a lightweight kitchen-sink pack, centered around Create technology, and building.
Meant to be played with friends, a more chill/laid back type of pack, there are some things to explore, dungeons, bosses, better End

Attempts to not have multiple mods handling the same types of things. 
A better explanation will be provided when I can think of one.
